prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2023年旧高考理科最低位次约10293→10218→11678，呈小幅波动；2024年贵州省首年新高考，物理类位次大幅跳至43660（改革波动），2025年迅速回归至26 266，近两年呈明显回升趋势，2025年基准约26266名；2021-2023年理科计划30人，2024年物理类增至38人，2025年增至39人；2026年物理类计划39人， 与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，竞争格局基本稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河北工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第107名，近年排名稳定在103-109区 间，属中上水平211；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档异常事件；抖音综合热度排名第93位（评价为一般），短视频曝光量处于211高校中游水平 ，报考关注度无明显异常波动；该校在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科以工科为主（机械工程、材料科学与工程等B+等级），对报考热度影响 有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏热/高热，与该校主要招生专业方向匹配，对报考有一定正向拉动；贵州省2026年高考 总人数约29.9万，估算物理类考生约20.63万，较2025年（20.72万）微降，竞争略有缓解；省控线2025年物理类本科批387分，较2024年（380分）上升，反映整体竞争略加剧。河北工业大学主校区位于天津市，在贵州省属跨省招生，无本地倾斜；该校在贵州招生计划占比较小（约39人），地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历 年位次回升趋势、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生微降、省控线小幅上升以及工科专业热度偏高等因素，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准26266名基础上略有前移（竞争 略加剧），预测最低位次约26066名，区间25566-26566名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, the lowest ranking for science students in the old college entrance examination was approximately 10293 → 10218 → 11678, showing slight fluctuations; in 2024, the first year of the new college entrance examination in Guizhou Province, the physics category ranking jumped significantly to 43660 (reform fluctuation), and quickly returned to 26266 in 2025, showing a clear upward trend in the past two years, with a baseline of about 26266 in 2025; from 2021 to 2023, the science enrollment plan was 30, increased to 38 in 2024 for the physics category, and to 39 in 2025; the 2026 physics category enrollment plan is 39, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, and the competition pattern is basically stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 107th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 103-109 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the school's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal application incidents; the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 93rd (rated as average), with short video exposure at the mid-level of 211 universities, and no abnormal fluctuations in application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no A- or above level disciplines, with advantageous disciplines mainly in engineering (mechanical engineering, materials science and engineering, etc., at B+ level), which has limited impact on application popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to be popular/very popular socially, matching the main enrollment majors of the school, which has a certain positive pull on applications; the total number of college entrance examination takers in Guizhou Province in 2026 is about 299,000, with an estimated 206,300 physics category candidates, a slight decrease from 2025 (207,200), easing competition slightly; the provincial control line for the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 387 points, up from 2024 (380 points), reflecting a slight increase in overall competition. The main campus of Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin, and it recruits across provinces in Guizhou, with no local preference; the school's enrollment plan in Guizhou accounts for a small proportion (about 39 people), and regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the upward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in physics category candidates in the province, a slight increase in the provincial control line, and the high popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that the lowest ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 26266 (competition slightly intensifies), with a predicted lowest ranking of about 26066, and a range of 25566-26566.

When the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship engineering majors.
